Journal Articles

  • Self‑Regenerative Mo‑Based Solid Lubricant Coatings Deposited by APS as a PVD Alternative: Mechanical and Tribological Performance

    Tribology Transactions, 68(5), 1036–1051, 2025.
    DOI: 10.1080/10402004.2025.2519334

  • Tribo‑Oxidative Protection and Transfer Mechanisms of Molybdenum‑Based PVD Coatings

    Tribology Transactions, 1–12, 2026.
    DOI: 10.1080/10402004.2026.2639564

  • Impact of the Running‑In Procedure on Aging of Lithium‑Complex and Polyurea Greases in Rolling Bearings
    G. Calderon‑Salmeron, R. C. Martins, J. Leckner, S. Glavatskih
    Tribology Transactions, 69(1), 74–83, 2026.
    DOI: 10.1080/10402004.2025.2566756

  • Molybdenum APS‑Coatings: A Self‑Regenerative Solution for Wear Resistance in Dry‑Lubrication Applications
    R. C. Martins, D. Konopka, M. Dukat, F. Pape, M. Nicolaus, K. Möhwald, …
    Tribologie und Schmierungstechnik, 72(3–4), 54–58, 2025.
    DOI: 10.5555/tus20253%2B40054
